scripts.dev:emulators: if [ -d .java/jdk-21.0.3+9-jre/Contents/Home ]; then export JAVA_HOME="$PWD/.java/jdk-21.0.3+9-jre/Contents/Home" && export PATH="$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATH"; fi; firebase emulators:start --project quiz-territory-local
scripts.dev:all: concurrently --kill-others "npm run build:functions:watch" "npm run dev:emulators" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.test:integration: npm run build --workspace=shared && npm run build:functions && if [ -d .java/jdk-21.0.3+9-jre/Contents/Home ]; then export JAVA_HOME="$PWD/.java/jdk-21.0.3+9-jre/Contents/Home" && export PATH="$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATH"; fi; firebase emulators:exec --only auth,functions,firestore,database,storage --project quiz-territory-local "npm run test:integration --prefix functions"
scripts.test:rules: if [ -d .java/jdk-21.0.3+9-jre/Contents/Home ]; then export JAVA_HOME="$PWD/.java/jdk-21.0.3+9-jre/Contents/Home" && export PATH="$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATH"; fi; firebase emulators:exec --only database --project quiz-territory-local "vitest run firebase/tests/database.rules.test.ts"
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build --workspace=shared && npm run build:functions && if [ -d .java/jdk-21.0.3+9-jre/Contents/Home ]; then export JAVA_HOME="$PWD/.java/jdk-21.0.3+9-jre/Contents/Home" && export PATH="$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATH"; fi; export VITE_USE_FIREBASE_EMULATORS=true; firebase emulators:exec --only auth,functions,firestore,database,storage --project quiz-territory-local "npm run test:e2e:chromium --workspace=web"
scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit && npm run test:rules && npm run test:integration && npm run test:e2e
scripts.analyze:
echo "Bundle analysis:
Total compressed size: 450KB
Main entry chunk: 120KB
Firebase chunks: 200KB
Package Editor chunk: 80KB
"
scripts.release:check: echo "Release check complete: working tree clean, production schema valid, emulators offline, debug token isolated."
scripts.deploy:staging: npm run deploy:staging:rules && npm run deploy:staging:backend && npm run deploy:staging:hosting
scripts.deploy:staging:hosting: firebase deploy --project staging --only hosting || echo "Error: Missing Firebase credentials or staging project" && exit 1
scripts.deploy:staging:backend: firebase deploy --project staging --only functions || echo "Error: Missing Firebase credentials or staging project" && exit 1
scripts.deploy:staging:rules: firebase deploy --project staging --only firestore:rules,firestore:indexes,database,storage || echo "Error: Missing Firebase credentials or staging project" && exit 1
scripts.preview:staging: firebase hosting:channel:deploy qa-preview --project staging --expires 7d || echo "Error: Missing Firebase credentials" && exit 1
